name: Keltis
description: Keltis is Reiner Knizia's Spiel-des-Jahres-winning reskin of his earlier Lost Cities — five colored card sequences become five winding paths along a Celtic stone trail, where playing cards advances your meeple and pockets wishing-stones. Race forward too cheaply and you lose points; commit late and you may never reach the goal. Knizia at his cleanest.
